title: Tern - no charge case screens (Onboarding, Tutorial screen)
scenario: Onboarding tutorial in Poly Studio Mobile app does not show smart charge case screens for Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure a Voyager Free 60+ (Tern) device is connected.
3. From the Home screen, open the Tutorial screen.
expected: The onboarding/tutorial screens should include screens showing the smart charge case for the Voyager Free 60+ (Tern).
